message:
test(fcp-host): expand cancellation, batch, and progress test suites

- cancellation.rs: +59 tests (46→105) — serialization roundtrips, controller
  lifecycle, checkpoint edge cases, audit ordering, many-ops scenarios
- batch.rs: +60 tests (65→125) — complex DAGs, zone validation, 100-op chains,
  stop-on-error propagation, forest topologies, response serialization
- progress.rs: +62 tests (64→126) — unit labels, aggregate calculations,
  phase transitions, throttling, special char operation IDs, payload serde

fcp-host lib tests: 944 total, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
